mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_type AS productType, p.target_large AS targetLarge, p.target_detail AS targetDetail, TO_CHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.product_desc, 1000, 1)) AS productDesc, p.rate_category AS rateCategory, p.min_period_month AS minPeriodMonth, p.max_period_month AS maxPeriodMonth, p.min_amount AS minAmount, p.max_amount AS maxAmount, p.app_start_date AS appStartDate, p.app_end_date AS appEndDate, NVL(MIN(r.base_rate), 0) AS minRate, NVL(MAX(r.base_rate + NVL(r.preferential_rate, 0)), 0) AS maxRate FROM products p LEFT JOIN interest_rates r ON p.product_id = r.product_id AND r.is_active = 'Y' WHERE p.is_active = 'Y' AND p.approve_status = '승인'
AND p.product_type IN ('FOREIGN_DEP', 'FOREIGN_SAV')
AND ( p.target_large = #{targetLarge} OR p.target_large = 'ALL' )
AND ( p.target_detail = #{targetDetail} OR p.target_detail = 'ALL' )
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.target_large, p.target_detail, TO_CHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.product_desc, 1000, 1)), p.rate_category, p.min_period_month, p.max_period_month, p.min_amount, p.max_amount, p.app_start_date, p.app_end_date ORDER BY maxRate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT product_id AS productId, is_active AS isActive, product_name AS productName, product_type AS productType, target_large AS targetLarge, target_detail AS targetDetail, product_desc AS productDesc, min_amount AS minAmount, max_amount AS maxAmount, min_period_month AS minPeriodMonth, max_period_month AS maxPeriodMonth, interest_payment_type AS interestPaymentType, applied_exchange_rate_type AS appliedExchangeRateType, app_start_date AS appStartDate, app_end_date AS appEndDate, rate_category AS rateCategory, approve_status AS approveStatus FROM products WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_active = 'Y' AND approve_status = '승인'

SELECT product_currency_id AS productCurrencyId, product_id AS productId, currency_code AS currencyCode, currency_name AS currencyName, is_available AS isAvailable FROM product_currencies WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_available = 'Y' ORDER BY currency_code

SELECT rate_id AS rateId, product_id AS productId, currency_code AS currencyCode, customer_type AS customerType, residency_type AS residencyType, period_month AS periodMonth, base_rate AS baseRate, preferential_rate AS preferentialRate, base_rate + NVL(preferential_rate, 0) AS maxRate, maturity_rate AS maturityRate, early_cancel_rate AS earlyCancelRate, rate_start_date AS rateStartDate, rate_end_date AS rateEndDate, is_active AS isActive, rate_type AS rateType FROM interest_rates WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY currency_code, period_month ASC

SELECT p.pref_rate_id AS prefRateId, p.rate_id AS rateId, p.condition_type AS conditionType, p.condition_desc AS conditionDesc, p.pref_rate AS prefRate FROM preferential_rate_conditions p JOIN interest_rates r ON p.rate_id = r.rate_id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY p.pref_rate DESC
